articles.author: Brendan Byrne
articles.title: Artemis II astronauts heading home after historic moon flyby - NPR
articles.description: The Artemis II astronauts are on a course back to Earth after flying by the moon Monday, witnessing a solar eclipse, and breaking a distance record set by NASA's Apollo 13 astronauts.
articles.content:
The crew of NASA's Artemis II mission is heading homeward after looping around the far side of the moon. 
This marks a critical milestone for the mission, which is the first to send humans to the mo… [+4366 chars]
